title: Enable Dependency Sweeper Issue Fix Request Route
goal: Implement the next Route Decision slice for dependency alerts by creating a bounded Issue Fix Request route for Dependency Sweeper.

decisions.decision: Runtime chain is Dependency Alert -> Route Decision -> Issue Fix Request -> Dependency Sweeper.
This implementation work is activated through a GitHub issue comment Activation Request.
First slice stops at Issue Fix Request requested, duplicate, or denied; it does not simulate Dependency Sweeper claim or Fix PR.
Only patch/minor dependency alerts with low/medium risk may create requests. Major, high, critical, and non-main signals are denied.

nodes.title: Dependency Sweeper route entry
nodes.completionCondition: All child leaves are completed/deferred/linked follow-up and durable decisions are absorbed into tests or docs.

children.title: Add deterministic route replay and route table entry
notes: No real Dependency Sweeper consumer claim, package upgrade, branch, PR, or GitHub issue mutation in replay.
Implemented a dependency-sweeper route that only allows patch/minor low/medium dependency alerts and denies risky/non-main signals before request creation.

verificationEvidence.notes: Covers requested, duplicate, major/high/critical denied, and non-main denied outcomes.
Confirms route-decision suite still passes with generic issue-fix route matching.
Confirms Issue Fix Request contract and existing Fix Consumer fixtures still pass.
Initial sandbox run failed on npm registry DNS. Network-enabled rerun passed.

children.title: Closeout docs and activation evidence
notes: Merge process decisions into durable testing/ZJ-LOOP docs before closeout.
Process roadmap should be deleted or absorbed before merging to main.
